steps.title: Compare typical and unusual works
steps.content: The text says Erdrich's work usually focuses on everyday life in Ojibwe communities. It then says The Crown of Columbus is set largely on a Caribbean island.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content:
• Choice A mentions a movie adaptation, which the passage never states.
  • Choice C mentions dialogue, which the passage never discusses.
  • Choice D claims the main characters are Ojibwe, but the passage does not say that.

steps.title: Use the setting difference
steps.content: Since the novel is set largely on a Caribbean island, it differs from most of Erdrich's work by not being set in a rural Ojibwe community. The answer is B.
